headline: Here’s What Analysts Are Saying About Comcast Corporation (CMCSA)
summary: Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) is one of the best communication stocks to invest in. Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) received several rating updates following the release of its fiscal Q1 financial results. Deutsche Bank downgraded Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) to Hold from Buy on April 24, bringing the price target on the stock down to $34 from $35. The firm […]
